enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: USART not able to wake up the MCU from Stop mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: USART able to wake up the MCU from Stop mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Interrupt is generated whenever IDLE=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Interrupt is generated whenever ORE=1 or RXNE=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Interrupt is generated whenever TC=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Interrupt is generated whenever TXE=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Interrupt is generated whenever PE=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Bit8
enum_values.description: 1 start bit, 8 data bits, n stop bits

enum_values.name: Bit9
enum_values.description: 1 start bit, 9 data bits, n stop bits

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Receiver can switch between mute mode and active mode

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Interrupt is generated when the CMF bit is set in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: An USART interrupt is generated when the RTOF bit is set in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: A USART interrupt is generated when the EOBF flag is set in the ISR register

enum_values.name: M0
enum_values.description: Use M0 to set the data bits

enum_values.name: Bit7
enum_values.description: 1 start bit, 7 data bits, n stop bits

enum_values.name: Start
enum_values.description: Measurement of the start bit is used to detect the baud rate

enum_values.name: Edge
enum_values.description: Falling edge to falling edge measurement

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Auto baud rate detection is disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Auto baud rate detection is enabled

enum_values.name: LSB
enum_values.description: data is transmitted/received with data bit 0 first, following the start bit

enum_values.name: MSB
enum_values.description: data is transmitted/received with MSB (bit 7/8/9) first, following the start bit

enum_values.name: Positive
enum_values.description: Logical data from the data register are send/received in positive/direct logic

enum_values.name: Negative
enum_values.description: Logical data from the data register are send/received in negative/inverse logic

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: TX pin signal works using the standard logic levels

enum_values.name: Inverted
enum_values.description: TX pin signal values are inverted

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: RX pin signal works using the standard logic levels

enum_values.name: Inverted
enum_values.description: RX pin signal values are inverted

enum_values.name: Standard
enum_values.description: TX/RX pins are used as defined in standard pinout

enum_values.name: Swapped
enum_values.description: The TX and RX pins functions are swapped

enum_values.name: Low
enum_values.description: Steady low value on CK pin outside transmission window

enum_values.name: High
enum_values.description: Steady high value on CK pin outside transmission window

enum_values.name: First
enum_values.description: The first clock transition is the first data capture edge

enum_values.name: Second
enum_values.description: The second clock transition is the first data capture edge

enum_values.name: NotOutput
enum_values.description: The clock pulse of the last data bit is not output to the CK pin

enum_values.name: Output
enum_values.description: The clock pulse of the last data bit is output to the CK pin

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: An interrupt is generated whenever LBDF=1 in the ISR register

fields.name: WUFIE
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode interrupt enable

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: An USART interrupt is generated whenever WUF=1 in the ISR register

fields.name: WUS
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode interrupt flag selection

enum_values.name: Start
enum_values.description: WuF active on Start bit detection

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: The DE signal is output on the RTS pin

enum_values.name: NotDisabled
enum_values.description: DMA is not disabled in case of reception error

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DMA is disabled following a reception error

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: Overrun Error Flag, ORE, is set when received data is not read before receiving new data

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Overrun functionality is disabled. If new data is received while the RXNE flag is still set the ORE flag is not set and the new received data overwrites the previous content of the RDR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: An interrupt is generated whenever CTSIF=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: CTS mode enabled, data is only transmitted when the CTS input is asserted

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: RTS output enabled, data is only requested when there is space in the receive buffer

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DMA mode is disabled for transmission

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DMA mode is enabled for transmission

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DMA mode is disabled for reception

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DMA mode is enabled for reception

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: NACK transmission in case of parity error is disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: NACK transmission during parity error is enabled

enum_values.name: NotSelected
enum_values.description: Half duplex mode is not selected

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: An interrupt is generated when FE=1 or ORE=1 or NF=1 in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Discard
enum_values.description: Set the TXE flags. This allows to discard the transmit data

enum_values.name: Discard
enum_values.description: clears the RXNE flag. This allows to discard the received data without reading it, and avoid an overrun condition

enum_values.name: Mute
enum_values.description: Puts the USART in mute mode and sets the RWU flag

enum_values.name: Break
enum_values.description: sets the SBKF flag and request to send a BREAK on the line, as soon as the transmit machine is available

enum_values.name: Request
enum_values.description: resets the ABRF flag in the USART_ISR and request an automatic baud rate measurement on the next received data frame

enum_values.name: Reached
enum_values.description: End of Block (number of characters) reached

enum_values.name: Reached
enum_values.description: Timeout value reached without any data reception

enum_values.name: NotChanged
enum_values.description: No change occurred on the CTS status line

enum_values.name: Changed
enum_values.description: A change occurred on the CTS status line

enum_values.name: DataReady
enum_values.description: Received data is ready to be read

enum_values.name: Error
enum_values.description: Framing error or break character is detected

fields.name: WUCF
fields.description: Wakeup from Stop mode clear flag

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the WUF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the CMF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the EOBF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the RTOF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the CTSIF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the LBDF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the TC flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the IDLE flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the ORE flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the NF flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the FE flag in the ISR register

enum_values.name: Clear
enum_values.description: Clears the PE flag in the ISR register
